analysis.headline: A shift from long-form structure into compact, high-rotation pop chapters.
points: The early chain is led by K-pop, classical, pop/other; the latest chain is led by K-pop, pop/other.
Red Velvet, aespa, NewJeans, LE SSERAFIM are the strongest repeat artists across the full record.
v1 -> v2, v5 -> v6, v6 -> v7, v7 -> v8, v8 -> v9 are reset points, not small edits.
The pattern reads like a private listening journal: keep the emotional engine, rotate the surface language.
analysis.sourceBoundary: Dates use local Spotify account-cache estimates where recovered; unresolved dates stay marked instead of guessed.
